response.content:
Google Drive is now connected! ✅

The auth flow completed without needing any manual credentials — the extension was installed, activated, and I was able to successfully list files from the connected account. Here's a sample of what's accessible:

| Name | Type |
|---|---|
| REBORN_QA_7E_BUG_TRACKER_SHEET | Spreadsheet |
| REBORN_QA_6E_GMAIL_TO_SHEET_DELIVERY | Spreadsheet |
| REBORN_QA_5D_STRATEGY_DOC | Document |
| Test - IronClaw Connection | Spreadsheet |
| bug logging Google Sheet | Spreadsheet |

All Google Drive capabilities are ready to use — listing files, reading/downloading content, uploading, creating folders, sharing, and managing permissions.
